# codex-rs/debug-client/

Minimal interactive debug client for the Codex app server (protocol v2).

## What this folder does

A tiny command-line client that spawns `codex app-server` as a subprocess and communicates with it over stdin/stdout using JSON-RPC. Prints all server notifications and responses, lets users type turns interactively, and supports thread management (new, resume, switch). Primarily used for debugging and testing the app server protocol.

**Note:** This code is mainly generated by Codex and is not intended for production use.

## Where it plugs in

- Spawns `codex app-server` as a child process
- Communicates via the app server protocol v2 (JSON-RPC over stdio)
- Uses `orbit-code-app-server-protocol` for protocol types

## Imports from

- `orbit-code-app-server-protocol` -- `AskForApproval` and protocol types
- `clap` -- CLI argument parsing
- `serde` / `serde_json` -- JSON-RPC message serialization

## Key files

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `Cargo.toml` | Crate manifest; depends on `orbit-code-app-server-protocol`, `clap`, `serde_json` |
| `README.md` | Usage guide with CLI flags and interactive commands |
| `src/main.rs` | `Cli` clap struct; main loop reading stdin and dispatching commands |
| `src/client.rs` | `AppServerClient` -- spawns `codex app-server`, sends JSON-RPC requests, manages thread lifecycle |
| `src/commands.rs` | `UserCommand` / `InputAction` -- parses user input into commands (`:help`, `:new`, `:resume`, `:quit`, etc.) |
| `src/output.rs` | `Output` -- formats and prints server messages to stdout/stderr |
| `src/reader.rs` | Background reader for server stdout, parsing JSON-RPC lines |
| `src/state.rs` | `ReaderEvent` -- events from the background reader thread |
